message:
feat: enable GoReleaser auto-publishing to Homebrew and Scoop

Removes `skip: true` from brews section and adds full configuration for:
- Dicklesworthstone/homebrew-tap (Formula/slb.rb)
- Dicklesworthstone/scoop-bucket (slb.json)

Includes shell completion generation and helpful caveats.
Updates release summary to show correct Homebrew install command.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -59,6 +59,8 @@ jobs:
         env:
           GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
           COSIGN_EXPERIMENTAL: "true"
+          # Token with write access to homebrew-tap and scoop-bucket repos
+          HOMEBREW_TAP_GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.HOMEBREW_TAP_GITHUB_TOKEN }}
 
       - name: Upload artifacts
         uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
@@ -178,7 +180,7 @@ jobs:
           echo "go install github.com/${{ github.repository }}/cmd/slb@v${VERSION}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
           echo '```' >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
           echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
-          echo "### Homebrew (coming soon)" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "### Homebrew" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
           echo '```bash' >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
-          echo "brew install slb" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "brew install dicklesworthstone/tap/slb" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
           echo '```' >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY

@@ -93,18 +93,40 @@ release:
   name_template: "v{{.Version}}"
 
 brews:
-  - skip: true # TODO: Create Dicklesworthstone/homebrew-tap repo to enable Homebrew
+  - name: slb
     repository:
       owner: Dicklesworthstone
       name: homebrew-tap
+      branch: main
+      token: "{{ .Env.HOMEBREW_TAP_GITHUB_TOKEN }}"
     directory: Formula
     homepage: https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/slb
     description: "Simultaneous Launch Button - Two-person rule for dangerous commands"
     license: MIT
     install: |
       bin.install "slb"
+      generate_completions_from_executable(bin/"slb", "completion")
     test: |
       system "#{bin}/slb", "version"
+    caveats: |
+      SLB (Simultaneous Launch Button) implements two-person authorization.
+
+      Quick start:
+        slb init                  # Initialize in current project
+        slb create "rm -rf /"     # Create a launch request
+        slb list                  # List pending requests
+
+# Scoop bucket publishing
+scoops:
+  - name: slb
+    repository:
+      owner: Dicklesworthstone
+      name: scoop-bucket
+      branch: main
+      token: "{{ .Env.HOMEBREW_TAP_GITHUB_TOKEN }}"
+    homepage: https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/slb
+    description: "Simultaneous Launch Button - Two-person rule for dangerous commands"
+    license: MIT
 
 nfpms:
   - id: default
